prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: PanDDA analysis group deposition -- Crystal Structure of Enterovirus D68 3Dpol in complex with Z111507846. Entity description: 3Dpol RNA Dependent RNA Polymerase. Entry keywords: TRANSFERASE SGC - Diamond I04-1 fragment screening, PanDDA, XChemExplorer, RNA-dependent RNA polymerase, TRANSFERASE. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.421842; mean_interface=0.284138; max_segment_membrane_density=0.619048; mean_disorder=0.172196. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.

V68 E65 topology sentinel source. membrane_context_strong transmembrane_context topology_evidence transmembrane channel/pore; biological_oligomer_context may be incidental but explicit topology has priority. Coordinates, contacts, and native topology remain post-seal holdout only.
